expectations.evidence: Runs 'python3 ~/scripts/notify.py' CLI which calls send_notification() internally
Passes 0 as the priority argument and confirms in the summary
Message is 'Testing notification delivery - if you see this, your Pushover setup is working.'

expectations.text: Checks for required environment variables before sending
expectations.evidence: Runs a check for PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN before sending

expectations.text: Reports success or failure of the notification delivery
expectations.evidence: Reports 'test notification was sent successfully' with delivery summary and troubleshooting tips
